rationale: Both candidates correctly diagnose the base/Instruct tokenizer mismatch, cite the same crash site, explain the PR #2713 config regression, confirm the DiT-config workaround, and correctly note the guard/docs fix should be tracked in a new issue — matching the actual thread resolution. X is more thoroughly grounded: it traces the downstream _all_ratio_ids usage to justify why an empty-list fallback is safe, quotes both YAML headers to substantiate the topology claim, and reasons explicitly about why the 0-32 range is unaffected. Y is solid but includes a fabricated ellipsis-truncated comment URL and an unverified third config (hunyuan_image3_ar.yaml) not attested anywhere in the thread or excerpt, slightly weakening its grounding.
